heading: Overview
body:
This section demonstrates how to query the indexed vector data in
the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection using the
the [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) stage. These sample queries also demonstrate
the various [evaluation query operators](manual/reference/mql/query-predicates) and [aggregation pipeline operators](manual/reference/mql/expressions) operators that we can use
in the query to pre-filter the data that we perform the semantic
search on.
